name: healthleader
description: Read-only directory of healthcare conferences (Medicare, Medicaid, payer, quality). List, search, locate, and export conferences to calendar.

tools.name: list_conferences
tools.description: List conferences with filters (focus, state, dates, virtual, ceu, upcoming).

tools.name: get_conference
tools.description: Get one conference by slug (full public record).

tools.name: search_conferences
tools.description: Relevance search over name, host, description, themes.

tools.name: conferences_near
tools.description: Conferences in or near a city.

tools.name: directory_stats
tools.description: Aggregate counts by focus, state, type, or month.
